mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account ( username, phone, email, password_hash, status ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, phone, email, password_hash, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user_account WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, phone, email, password_hash, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user_account WHERE id = #{userId}
SELECT r.code FROM user_role ur JOIN role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_token ( user_id, token_hash, device_id, user_agent, ip_address, expires_at, last_used_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{deviceId}, #{userAgent}, #{ipAddress}, #{expiresAt}, #{lastUsedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, token_hash, device_id, user_agent, ip_address, expires_at, revoked_at, created_at, last_used_at FROM refresh_token WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO login_log ( user_id, username, success, fail_reason, ip_address, user_agent ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{username}, #{success}, #{failReason}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent} )
